title: Agent Forensics
freshness: historical-v23-full-report; current v24 archive cardinality is in temporal-archive-aggregates and archive-debt-summary

delta_vs_2026_06_27.comparability_note: Not a clean time-series point: archive deduplication, schema changes, provider coverage, and pricing coverage changed between runs.

claim: Polylogue can produce a longitudinal agent-usage report over the live archive with provenance-separated stored/catalog-priced cost views and explicit physical/logical token-grain labels.
non_claim: This is not final billing reconciliation and not a finished all-provider logical-session repricing. The physical token total is a current archive measurement; the Claude Code logical high-water figure is the current non-replay grain for logical-work claims.
proof: report.md plus valid charts/*.svg against active schema v23 archive; token-grain audit refreshed with polylogue analyze usage.
caveat: This full report was generated before the v24 rebuild. Current v24 physical counts are recorded in current_archive_cardinality, but the full forensics packet should be regenerated after session-profile convergence before citing logical high-water totals as current.
